source: authoritative ARC-GEN generator implementations, read directly

22.rule: Recover one 3x3 output from four spatially separated partial 3x3 copies. Each copy has a gray center marker and supplies two non-center cells of one color; the output center is gray.

181.rule: Mirror the cyan sprite horizontally across the side selected by the fixed yellow marker, while preserving the yellow marker.

104.rule: Infer one of four quadrants from the 3x3 green/red key and draw two 4x4 green blocks at the quadrant-dependent positions in a 9x9 output.

294.rule: For each of two gray filled rectangles, recolor its strict interior red; the whole input/output pair may be rotated by one of four gravity directions.

128.rule: Each of three non-overlapping bottom-anchored colored rectangles is translated upward by exactly its own height, independently.

152.rule: Mirror the 3x3 input horizontally to width 6, then mirror the resulting three rows vertically to height 6.

203.rule: The grid is made of concentric square color rings; reverse the ring-color order while preserving every ring geometry.

236.rule: Remove the yellow separator and output green exactly where the 4x4 blue top bitmap and red bottom bitmap differ (binary XOR).
